title: Profile
description: Composite user profile combining auth identity fields (read-only, from DecodedIdToken) with Firestore profile fields (mutable via PATCH).

email.description: Email address from the identity provider (read-only)

emailVerified.description: Whether the email has been verified (read-only)

picture.description: Profile picture URL from the identity provider (read-only)

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the profile was created (system-managed)

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the profile was last modified (system-managed)
